tokens.@ITERATIONS: Number of morphology iterations resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@K_COLS: Kernel width resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@K_ROWS: Kernel height resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@K_SHAPE: Structuring element shape resolved by the same configuration used by HLS composition.
tokens.@input_0: Input image from the previous pipeline step.
